title: Kelepi Tanginoa
extract:
Kelepi Tanginoa () (born 1 March 1994) is an Australian professional rugby league footballer who plays as a prop, second-row forward and loose forward for the Warrington Wolves in the Super League.
He previously played for Wakefield Trinity and Hull KR in the Super League and the Parramatta Eels, North Queensland Cowboys and the Manly-Warringah Sea Eagles in the NRL.
